inline.summary: First home buyers may be eligible for transfer duty support depending on property value and residency status. This summary gives the key threshold only.
inline.content:
If the property value is below the full exemption threshold, eligible buyers can receive a full exemption. Above that threshold and up to the concessional cap, buyers can receive a reduced rate. Eligibility may also depend on occupancy timing and whether all applicants meet the first home criteria.

Always provide a link to the full policy page so users can verify the current threshold, conditions, and evidence requirements before they proceed.

supplementary.summary: Most people will not need this detail. Expand for accepted evidence combinations.
supplementary.content:
Bring one primary identity document and one secondary document that includes your current address.

  • Primary: Australian passport, Australian birth certificate, or Australian citizenship certificate.
  • Secondary: Medicare card, utility bill (dated within 3 months), or bank statement (dated within 3 months).
  • If your name has changed, include a change of name or marriage certificate.
